description_long: This is a luxurious, mid-century modern swivel chair with a matching ottoman, featuring a deep black leather upholstery with button tufting on the seat back and seat. The chair's back and sides are encased in a curved, polished wood shell, giving it a sophisticated and classic appearance. The armrests are thick, rounded, and upholstered in the same black leather, seamlessly integrated into the seat structure. The chair and ottoman both rest on sturdy, black metal star-shaped bases, providing stability and a contemporary touch. The rear of the chair reveals exposed metal brackets and fasteners, emphasizing its robust construction. This piece is both stylish and functional, suitable for upscale urban interiors or modern office environments.
description: A black leather swivel chair with a matching ottoman, featuring a curved wood shell and star-shaped metal base. The chair has button-tufted upholstery, thick armrests, and a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the button-tufted black leather seat and back, thick armrests, and the ottoman aligned in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's ergonomic recline, curved wood shell, and the separation between the chair and ottoman.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the polished wood shell, exposed metal brackets, and the central support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest profile, wood shell curvature, and the ottoman's matching design.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, black, metal cylindrical column branching into a star-shaped base; appears fixed and robust.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, gently curved rectangular backrest with deep button tufting, upholstered in black leather and encased in a polished wood shell.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, rounded, fully upholstered in black leather, seamlessly attached to the seat and backrest with no visible adjustment.
